ogTitle: Gurra Gurra vs Hackham West: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Gurra Gurra and Hackham West.
heading: Gurra Gurra vs Hackham West — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Gurra Gurra, South Australia and Hackham West, South Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Hackham West has a lower overall climate risk score (34/100) compared to Gurra Gurra (37/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Gurra Gurra or Hackham West safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Gurra Gurra has a flood risk score of 60/100, while Hackham West scores 44/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Gurra Gurra scores 46/100 for bushfire risk. Hackham West scores 42/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Gurra Gurra or Hackham West?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Hackham West has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 1.1% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
